query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.email,
  u.role,
  edp.enabled AS digestEnabled,
  edp.frequency,
  edp.lastSentAt
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN emailDigestPrefs edp ON edp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.id NOT IN (1, 2550006, 3360134, 3360129, 13020010, 3870014, 18360001, 3630009, 2820073, 4590008, 11580001)
ORDER BY u.name ASC;
